message.content: This section covers the topic of competitiveness evaluation for 4X strategy games, introducing a "competitiveness scorecard" as the core entity and metric framework. It can answer questions regarding the scoring dimensions, evaluation criteria, and benchmarking methods used to assess titles within this genre. The section is structured to likely feature a table or figure detailing the scorecard layout, but the provided excerpt contains no specific dates, definitions, procedures, empirical claims, or evidence types. It serves as a structural reference for understanding how competitive performance is quantified or compared for 4X strategy games.
